description_long: This is a modern diesel locomotive painted in a deep blue livery with the branding 'First Great Western' prominently displayed on its side. The front of the train features a streamlined, aerodynamic nose with a large windshield and several headlights, while the sides are adorned with subtle panel lines and ventilation grilles. The roof is equipped with multiple vents and access panels, indicating the presence of powerful internal machinery. The undercarriage reveals detailed bogies, wheels, and suspension components, all rendered in dark metallic tones. The train's body is primarily constructed from metal, with glass windows and plastic or rubber trim elements. There are no visible passenger doors or windows along the sides, suggesting this is a locomotive unit rather than a passenger carriage.
description: A streamlined blue diesel locomotive with 'First Great Western' branding, featuring a sleek nose, roof vents, and detailed undercarriage components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the aerodynamic nose, windshield, and headlights.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the 'First Great Western' logo, panel lines, and undercarriage details.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back panel, roof vents, and rear coupling area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar features to the other side, including branding and undercarriage.
